sauna.title: Your sauna (1 of 5)
sauna.description:
Schvitz Master runs your whole sauna session: it tracks heating, runs each round and break, plays your music, and tidies up at the end.

First, the physical sauna. Only a temperature sensor is required.

data_description.temp_sensor: Main air temperature. Used to tell you when the sauna's ready and to record the session's peak temp.
data_description.door_sensor: Optional. Monitored during a session (and used for the door-open safety cut-off).
data_description.power_sensor: Optional. The sauna plug's power draw — this is how the integration knows the heater is actually on.
data_description.operation_sensor: Optional. A text sensor that already reports Off / On / Heating (e.g. from your plug). Used in preference to a raw power threshold.

power.title: Power & switches (2 of 5)
power.description:
How the sauna is switched on/off and what happens to lights at the start and end. All optional.

Note: HA can switch the sauna on/off, but not set the thermostat if that's a separate hardwired panel.

data.trigger_on_heater: Start a session when the sauna is switched on

data_description.trigger_on_heater: When on, enabling the heater switch (e.g. schvitz mode) automatically begins a session — matching how you start the sauna today.
data_description.heater_switch: The switch/boolean you flip to power the sauna. The integration watches it as the session trigger and turns it off at the end.
data_description.start_scene: A scene you compose in HA (e.g. set the sauna lamp to a colour). Activated when a session starts — far more flexible than just switching lights on.
data_description.pre_switches: Extra switches/lights to turn on at start that aren't in the scene.
data_description.end_off_switches: Lights/switches to turn off when the session ends.

session.title: Session defaults (3 of 5)
session.description: A session is made of rounds — each round is one time you sit, with a cool-down break in between. Two rounds is typical. You can change all of these per session later, without coming back here.

data_description.default_rounds: How many times you sit in the sauna per session (the rounds). Usually 2.
data_description.default_round_min: How long each round in the sauna lasts.
data_description.default_break_min: Leave at 0 for open-ended breaks — after a round the sauna waits until you tap Next (back from your cold shower). Set a number if you'd prefer a timed break.
data_description.warmup_target_temp: When the sauna reaches this temperature you get a 'ready' notification — then you tap Start to begin round 1.
data_description.idle_heating_timeout: Safety: if the sauna's left heating with no round started for this long, auto-end and switch it off. 0 disables.
data_description.door_open_timeout: Safety: if the door stays open this long during a session, end and switch off. 0 disables.

media.title: Music (4 of 5)
media.description: Optionally play a Music Assistant playlist through a speaker during the session.

data_description.media_player: The speaker to play on (e.g. a Music Assistant player).
data_description.default_playlist: Pick from your Music Assistant playlists — no need to find an ID. You can also choose a playlist per session.
data_description.music_start_mode: Whether the music starts when round 1 begins, or earlier — once the sauna warms up to a chosen temperature.
data_description.music_start_temp: Only used for 'when the sauna reaches a temperature': the music starts the moment the sauna first hits this temperature.

tracking.title: Tracking & notifications (5 of 5)
tracking.description: Optionally track water and heart rate, and choose where notifications go. All optional — any sensor missing on a given day is simply skipped.

data_description.water_sensor: e.g. a smart water bottle. Totals the water you drink during a session and charts it over time.
data_description.water_source_mode: 'delta' sums increases (a running-total bottle); 'absolute' treats the value as the session total.
data_description.hr_sensor: Records your average and max heart rate for the session.
data_description.notify_service: Where session notifications go (ready, round start, break, complete). Pick a notify service or type one.

abort.already_configured: A sauna with that name already exists.

sauna.title: Your sauna (1 of 5)
sauna.description: The physical sauna. Only a temperature sensor is required.

power.title: Power & switches (2 of 5)
power.description: How the sauna is switched, and lights at start/end (all optional).

data.trigger_on_heater: Start a session when the sauna is switched on

session.title: Session defaults (3 of 5)
session.description: A session is made of rounds — each round is one time you sit, with a break in between.

data_description.default_rounds: How many times you sit per session. Usually 2.
data_description.default_break_min: 0 = open-ended (wait for Next); set a number for a timed break.

media.title: Music (4 of 5)
media.description: Playlist (from Music Assistant), speaker, volume, and when the music starts.

options.temp: When the sauna reaches a temperature

start_session.name: Start session
start_session.description: Turn the sauna on and begin the heating phase.

end_session.name: End session
end_session.description: End the current session and switch the sauna off.

next_round.name: Next round
next_round.description: Advance to the next round or break.

extend_round.name: Extend round
extend_round.description: Add minutes to the current timed phase.

start_round.name: Start round
start_round.description: Begin round 1 from heating (you're getting in), or the next round from a break.

log_water.name: Log water
log_water.description: Manually log water for the session.
